Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: jackets (short coats) [300046167], main garments for the upper body [300209278], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Waist-length or shorter jackets, with or without sleeves, usually collarless, and worn open in the front; originally worn by men in Spain.
Chaqueta informal a la altura de la cintura o más corta, con o sin mangas, generalmente sin cuello, y que se lleva abierta por la parte delantera; originalmente era llevada por los hombres en España.
Jasjes tot aan het middel of korter, met of zonder mouwen en open aan de voorkant; oorspronkelijk een in Spanje gedragen kledingstuk; mode voor vrouwen vanaf ca. 1850.
Hüftlange oder kürzere Jacke, mit oder ohne Ärmel, in der Regel ohne Kragen und vorne offen getragen; ursprünglich von den Männern in Spanien getragen.
及腰或更短的短上衣，可為有袖或無袖，多為無領且開襟；最早由西班牙的男性所穿著。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000001951/Mansfield and Cunnington, Handbook of English Costume (1973)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)
2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

2000106168/Parks Canada Descriptive Dictionary of Objects / Dictionnaire descriptif d’objets (c 1996)
2000106041/Centraal Museum Utrecht, MoMu Fashion Museum of Antwerp databases (2018-)
2000051465/Gran Diccionario Everest de la Lengua española (1995)
2000106041/Centraal Museum Utrecht, MoMu Fashion Museum of Antwerp databases (2018-)
2000051465/Gran Diccionario Everest de la Lengua española (1995)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000106168/Parks Canada Descriptive Dictionary of Objects / Dictionnaire descriptif d’objets (c 1996)
2000107882/國家教育研究院－雙語詞彙、學術名詞暨辭書資訊網
2000107883/經濟部智慧財產局－本國專利技術名詞中英對照查詢資料庫

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: p'o li lo shih shang i
po li luo shi shang yi
pō lì luò shì shàng yī
